candidates.why: Separate operating D&A summary line, but nothing indicates it is specifically tied to COGS/cost of sales rather than broader operating expenses.
Component of total D&A, but not labelled as COGS-related and should not be used when a higher-level D&A summary exists.

variables.notes: Selected COGS bucket is only 'Expense for subcontractors and disbursements'. The visible D&A rows are separate operating lines, but none are identified as cost-of-sales/COGS D&A. To avoid unsupported allocation and double counting, do not add any D&A separately to COGS.

candidates.why: Explicit operating D&A summary line shown separately from the selected SG&A row 'Selling&general exp.'; per same-level rule, this indicates D&A is not embedded in the selected SG&A row and should be added separately. Prefer this summary over component rows.
Component of the D&A summary. Do not choose if the summary row is available, to avoid double counting.
Component of the D&A summary. Do not choose if the summary row is available, to avoid double counting.
Minor balancing component under total D&A, not appropriate when the summary row exists.
Balancing adjustment under total D&A, not appropriate when the summary row exists.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA bucket is only 'Selling&general exp.'. The statement presents 'Depreciation and amortisation expense' as a separate operating line at the same level, so it appears outside the selected SG&A row rather than embedded within it. Use the summary row only, not its components.
